problem id: 016c474c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  11000011 -> 00001010
  01100100 -> 10010011
  01110000 -> 11000011
  00001010 -> 00101000
  01010100 -> 01010010
  01111101 -> 11110111
  10110111 -> 11011001
  11001100 -> 00110110
  10110100 -> 11010101
  10000111 -> 00011000

query: 00000001
predicted answer: 00000100
